comments.LineComment: | ContextMenu — Right-click property inspector for any element.
| At billion-agent scale, the context menu is the **interface between
| agents and reality**. When an agent right-clicks an element, they see:
| 1. **Applicable property groups** — Only what's relevant to this element
| 2. **Bounded editors** — Sliders, toggles, pickers with explicit limits
| 3. **Composable effects** — Add glow, shadow, motion paths
| 4. **No infinite loops** — Motion always has start and end keyframes
| -- Create context menu for a swatch
